topic: multiplying fractions and whole numbers by 2, doubling recipe quantities
latex:
Corey's favorite drink is a Red Bean Tapioca Milkshake. He wants to make two batches. Fill in the following table for how much of each ingredient he will need.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Batches} & 1 & 2 \\
\hline
vanilla ice cream (pints) & $\frac{3}{2}$ & \\
\hline
red beans (cups) & $\frac{1}{2}$ & \\
\hline
milk (cups) & $\frac{1}{3}$ & \\
\hline
lemon juice (teaspoons) & $\frac{5}{2}$ & \\
\hline
pearl tapioca (cups) & $\frac{1}{4}$ & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: vanilla ice cream: $3$, red beans: $1$, milk: $\frac{2}{3}$, lemon juice: $5$, pearl tapioca: $\frac{1}{2}$
